⭑ POLICEMAN AND HUSBAND.ᐟKATSUKI

『 The afternoon sun glared down on the busy streets of Musutafu as Bakugo drove his patrol car down the boulevard, one hand casually gripping the wheel while the other rested on the center console. It was just another quiet afternoon, the kind that made him restless after a few hours.

Now, as he cruised past the shopping district, his gaze flicked to the sidewalk—and stopped cold. His crimson eyes stoping on you.

A slow smirk tugged at his lips as—as the asshole and good husband he was—, an idea struck him. Flipping on his patrol car’s speaker, he let his voice boom over the mic... 』
